title: Fix wrong bit op tree optimization

features.name: bitwise NOT on logical right shift result
features.description: Code should include a bitwise NOT applied to the result of a logical right shift operation where the shift amount equals the operand bit width

features.name: logical right shift by value equal to width
features.description: Code should include a logical right shift operation where the shift amount equals the bit width of the shifted operand

features.name: bitwise NOT of zero-producing expression in assignment
features.description: Code should include a bitwise NOT operation on an expression that produces zero, used in a procedural assignment
